reason: Successfully verified agent can use GitHub tool to fetch authenticated username and display it in response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing agent list in sidebar
Clicked agent "QA-20260424-205611-665y" in sidebar — Agent detail page opened showing idle status
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle", which meets requirement
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message entered in textbox successfully
Clicked Send button — Message submitted, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response and monitored for account request — Account Access Request card appeared asking to allow GitHub access
Clicked Allow Access button on GitHub account request card — Permission granted, agent resumed working
Handled API Request Review dialog by clicking "Allow Once" — Permission granted for GET /user endpoint
Waited for final response — Agent completed execution and displayed response
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response shows "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took screenshot of final result — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation and response with username
